g.text: Online play - save reaches server immediately
Network goes offline - writes queue in IndexedDB
Network restored - replay queued writes in order
If any queued write was already applied
wrote but before client got the response),
and returns the current row without re-applying.
The queue entry is then safely dequeued.
replayQueue() returns a ReplayOutcome with three
(a 409 latches that write and every later write for
the same story), and failed (a non-offline 4xx/5xx
write is dropped from the queue, not retried).
Conflict during replay (another device advanced while offline)
"latch: this write and every LATER write
for the same story go into outcome.conflicts"
